Designed for movement, with perfect functionality and a focus on breathability and strength, the Aurion 3L pants, made with the Toray Dermizax 20K / 20K membrane, invite you to explore the mountains. Highly breathable and stretchy, with a wide cut, long vents, small pockets, adjustable belt, and Cordura® ankle reinforcement around an integrated extra water-resistant snow gaiter, all you have to do is choose your destination and buckle up. Enjoy your trip.

json_ld_products.name: Men's Aurion 3L Ski Pant
json_ld_products.description: Designed for movement, with perfect functionality and a focus on breathability and strength, the Aurion 3L pants, made with the Toray Dermizax 20K / 20K membrane, invite you to explore the mountains. Highly breathable and stretchy, with a wide cut, long vents, small pockets, adjustable belt, and Cordura® ankle reinforcement around an integrated extra water-resistant snow gaiter, all you have to do is choose your destination and buckle up. Enjoy your trip.

offers.name: Men's Aurion 3L Ski Pant - XL / olive-green
offers.description: Designed for movement, with perfect functionality and a focus on breathability and strength, the Aurion 3L pants, made with the Toray Dermizax 20K / 20K membrane, invite you to explore the mountains. Highly breathable and stretchy, with a wide cut, long vents, small pockets, adjustable belt, and Cordura® ankle reinforcement around an integrated extra water-resistant snow gaiter, all you have to do is choose your destination and buckle up. Enjoy your trip.
